/bin/zsh -c "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import *
from sympy.printing.ccode import ccode
from sympy.printing.fcode import fcode
A=MatrixSymbol('A',2,2); B=MatrixSymbol('B',2,2)
x=A-A*B-B
print(str(x)); print(latex(x)); pprint(x)
F=A[0,0].subs(A, A-B)
print(str(F)); print(ccode(F)); print(fcode(F))
PY"

from sympy.printing.pretty import pretty
A=MatrixSymbol('A',2,2);B=MatrixSymbol('B',2,2);C=MatrixSymbol('C',2,2)
x=A*B*C-A*B-B*C
print(repr(pretty(x)))
print(repr(pretty(x,use_unicode=False)))
PY"
